items.title: Easy Run
items.description: 5 km at an easy pace of 6:30-7:00 min/km. Focus on keeping your heart rate in Zone 2 (130-145 bpm).

items.title: Long Run
items.description: 8 km at a comfortable pace of 6:45-7:15 min/km. Aim to keep your heart rate below 150 bpm. This session will help build endurance.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Full-body weight training session focusing on compound movements. Include 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise with 60 seconds rest between sets.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: 6x400m intervals at 5:15 min/km pace with 2 minutes recovery jog in between. Warm up for 10 minutes and cool down for 10 minutes.
